stars.name: Robert Downey Jr.
stars.character: Tony Stark / Iron Man / DR. Doom

born.place: Manhattan, New York City, New York, USA

stars.bio: Robert John Downey Jr. is an American actor and producer. His career has been characterized by critical and popular success in his youth, followed by a period of substance abuse and legal troubles, before a dramatic career resurgence. He is widely regarded as one of the most talented actors of his generation. He is best known for his role as Tony Stark / Iron Man in the MCU, a role he played from 2008 to 2023 (and returning in 2026's Avengers: Doomsday).

stars.name: Chris Evans
stars.bio: Christopher Robert Evans is an American actor. He began his career with television roles in the late 1990s before transitioning to feature films in the early 2000s. He is best known for playing Steve Rogers / Captain America in the MCU, a role he portrayed from 2011 to 2019 across numerous films.

stars.name: Scarlett Johansson

born.place: Manhattan, New York City, New York, USA

stars.bio: Scarlett Ingrid Johansson is an American actress and singer. She was the world's highest-paid actress in 2018 and 2019, and has featured multiple times on the Forbes Celebrity 100 list. In the MCU, she played the beloved spy and assassin Natasha Romanoff / Black Widow across 9 films, from 2010 to 2021.

stars.name: Chris Hemsworth
stars.bio: Christopher Hemsworth is an Australian actor. He is best known for his portrayal of Thor in the MCU. Hemsworth first caught attention as Kim Hyde in the Australian TV series Home and Away before moving to Hollywood. He has portrayed Thor across numerous MCU films and continues to do so.

stars.name: Mark Ruffalo
stars.bio: Mark Alan Ruffalo is an American actor, director, and activist. He is known for playing Bruce Banner / Hulk in the MCU, having taken over the role from Edward Norton. Ruffalo has appeared in numerous MCU films and the She-Hulk: Attorney at Law Disney+ series.

stars.name: Jeremy Renner
stars.bio: Jeremy Lee Renner is an American actor and musician. He is known for his portrayal of Clint Barton / Hawkeye in the MCU, appearing in multiple films and the Disney+ series Hawkeye. He has been nominated for Academy Awards for Best Actor and Best Supporting Actor for other roles.

stars.name: Samuel L. Jackson
stars.bio: Samuel Leroy Jackson is an American actor and producer. One of the most widely recognized actors of his generation, the films in which he has appeared have collectively grossed over $27 billion worldwide. He plays Nick Fury, the founder of S.H.I.E.L.D. and key figure in the MCU, appearing in many films and the Secret Invasion series.

stars.name: Gwyneth Paltrow
stars.bio: Gwyneth Kate Paltrow is an American actress, businesswoman, and author. She played Pepper Potts, Tony Stark's love interest and later wife, across multiple MCU films from 2008 to 2019.

stars.name: Don Cheadle
stars.character: James Rhodes / War Machine / Iron Patriot
stars.bio: Donald Frank Cheadle Jr. is an American actor, director, producer, and writer. He took over the role of James Rhodes / War Machine from Terrence Howard in Iron Man 2, and has continued the role through the Armor Wars Disney+ series.

stars.name: Chris Pratt
stars.bio: Christopher Michael Pratt is an American actor. He is known for starring in both television and film, both comedic and dramatic roles. He plays Peter Quill / Star-Lord, the leader of the Guardians of the Galaxy across the MCU.

stars.name: Zoe Saldana
stars.bio: Zoe Yadira Saldana-Perego is an American actress. She is known for her roles in blockbuster science fiction films, including Avatar and the MCU's Guardians of the Galaxy franchise, where she plays Gamora, daughter of Thanos.

stars.name: Dave Bautista
stars.bio: David Michael Bautista Jr. is an American actor, author, and former professional wrestler. He played Drax the Destroyer in the Guardians of the Galaxy franchise within the MCU.

stars.name: Vin Diesel
stars.bio: Mark Sinclair, known professionally as Vin Diesel, is an American actor, producer, director, and screenwriter. He voices Groot in the Guardians of the Galaxy franchise, with his only dialogue being variations of 'I am Groot.'

stars.name: Bradley Cooper
stars.bio: Bradley Charles Cooper is an American actor and filmmaker. He voices Rocket Raccoon in the Guardians of the Galaxy franchise. He is a four-time Academy Award nominee and one of the highest-paid actors in the world.

stars.name: Tom Holland

born.place: Kingston upon Thames, Surrey, England, UK

stars.bio: Thomas Stanley Holland is an English actor. He is best known for playing Peter Parker / Spider-Man in the MCU, having taken on the role at age 19. He has starred in three standalone Spider-Man films and appeared in multiple other MCU productions.

stars.name: Benedict Cumberbatch
stars.bio: Benedict Timothy Carlton Cumberbatch is an English actor. He plays Stephen Strange / Doctor Strange in the MCU, a former neurosurgeon who becomes the Sorcerer Supreme. He has appeared in multiple MCU films and is set to continue the role.

stars.name: Chadwick Boseman
stars.bio: Chadwick Aaron Boseman was an American actor. He is best known for his portrayal of T'Challa / Black Panther in the MCU, from 2016's Captain America: Civil War until his death in 2020. He tragically passed away from colon cancer, a diagnosis he kept private throughout his MCU career. He became a cultural icon and symbol of heroism both on and off screen.

stars.name: Brie Larson
stars.bio: Brianne Sidonie Desaulniers, known professionally as Brie Larson, is an American actress, filmmaker, and activist. She plays Carol Danvers / Captain Marvel in the MCU, one of the universe's most powerful heroes. An Academy Award winner for Best Actress for 'Room' (2015).

stars.name: Paul Rudd
stars.bio: Paul Stephen Rudd is an American actor, comedian, writer, and producer. He is known for playing Scott Lang / Ant-Man in the MCU across three standalone films and additional appearances. He is also widely recognized for his seemingly ageless appearance.

stars.name: Evangeline Lilly
stars.bio: Nicole Evangeline Lilly is a Canadian actress and author. She plays Hope Van Dyne / The Wasp in the MCU's Ant-Man franchise.

stars.name: Tom Hiddleston
stars.bio: Thomas William Hiddleston is an English actor. He is best known for his portrayal of Loki, the God of Mischief and brother of Thor, in the MCU. He has appeared in multiple films and starred in the Disney+ series Loki.

stars.name: Elizabeth Olsen
stars.bio: Elizabeth Chase Olsen is an American actress. She plays Wanda Maximoff / Scarlet Witch in the MCU, a powerful reality-warping sorceress. She starred in the groundbreaking Disney+ series WandaVision and appeared in multiple MCU films.

stars.name: Paul Bettany
stars.bio: Paul Bettany is an English actor. He originally voiced J.A.R.V.I.S., Tony Stark's AI assistant, before becoming the Vision, a sentient android created from J.A.R.V.I.S.'s neural network and the Mind Stone. He starred alongside Elizabeth Olsen in WandaVision.

stars.name: Anthony Mackie
stars.bio: Anthony Mackie is an American actor. He plays Sam Wilson, who served as the Falcon before becoming the new Captain America in the MCU. He starred in the Disney+ series The Falcon and the Winter Soldier and leads the upcoming Captain America: Brave New World.

stars.name: Sebastian Stan
stars.character: Bucky Barnes / Winter Soldier / White Wolf
stars.bio: Sebastian Stan is a Romanian-American actor. He plays Bucky Barnes, Steve Rogers's best friend who was brainwashed into the deadly assassin known as the Winter Soldier. He co-starred in The Falcon and the Winter Soldier Disney+ series.

stars.name: Letitia Wright
stars.bio: Letitia Michelle Wright is a British-Guyanese actress. She plays Shuri, the princess of Wakanda and a technological genius, who takes on the Black Panther mantle in Black Panther: Wakanda Forever.

stars.name: Danai Gurira
stars.bio: Danai Jekesai Gurira is a Zimbabwean-American actress and playwright. She plays Okoye, the general of the Dora Milaje (Wakanda's elite female warriors) in the MCU.

stars.name: Winston Duke

born.place: Argyle, Saint Vincent and the Grenadines

stars.bio: Winston Duke is a Trinidadian-American actor. He plays M'Baku, the powerful leader of the Jabari Tribe and later king of Wakanda, in the MCU's Black Panther franchise.

stars.name: Tessa Thompson
stars.bio: Tessa Lynne Thompson is an American actress. She plays Brunnhilde / Valkyrie in the MCU, an Asgardian warrior and later king of New Asgard.

stars.name: Josh Brolin
stars.bio: Josh James Brolin is an American actor and producer. He provides both the voice and motion-capture performance for Thanos, the primary antagonist of the MCU's Infinity Saga, wielding the Infinity Gauntlet to erase half of all life in the universe.

stars.name: Cate Blanchett
stars.bio: Catherine Élise Blanchett is an Australian actress and theatre director. She played Hela, the Goddess of Death and sister of Thor, in Thor: Ragnarok. A two-time Academy Award winner.

stars.name: Michael B. Jordan
stars.bio: Michael Bakari Jordan is an American actor and filmmaker. He played N'Jadaka / Erik Killmonger, the compelling villain of Black Panther, in one of the MCU's most praised antagonist performances.

stars.name: Pom Klementieff
stars.bio: Pom Klementieff is a French-Canadian actress. She plays Mantis, an empath with telepathic abilities and member of the Guardians of the Galaxy, in the MCU.

stars.name: Karen Gillan
stars.bio: Karen Sheila Gillan is a Scottish actress and director. She plays Nebula, the cybernetically enhanced daughter of Thanos and eventual ally of the Avengers, in the MCU.

stars.name: Idris Elba
stars.bio: Idrissa Akuna Elba OBE is a British actor, writer, rapper, and DJ. He plays Heimdall, the all-seeing, all-hearing guardian of the Bifrost Bridge in Asgard, in the MCU's Thor films.

stars.name: Benedict Wong

born.place: Eccles, Salford, Greater Manchester, England, UK

stars.bio: Benedict Timothy Wong is a British actor. He plays Wong, the Sorcerer Supreme of Kamar-Taj, in the MCU. He has appeared in multiple MCU films and series.

stars.name: Taron Egerton
stars.bio: Taron David Egerton is a Welsh actor. Best known for the Kingsman franchise and his Academy Award-nominated role as Elton John in Rocketman, he has been cast to play a new version of Scott Lang / Ant-Man in the upcoming MCU slate.

stars.name: Mahershala Ali
stars.bio: Mahershala Ali is an American actor and rapper. A two-time Academy Award winner for Best Supporting Actor, he has been cast as Eric Brooks / Blade, the daywalker vampire hunter, in the upcoming MCU Blade film.

stars.name: Oscar Isaac
stars.bio: Oscar Isaac Hernández Estrada is an American-Guatemalan actor. He plays Marc Spector / Moon Knight, a mercenary with dissociative identity disorder granted powers by the Egyptian moon god Khonshu, in the Disney+ series Moon Knight.

stars.name: Tatiana Maslany
stars.bio: Tatiana Gabrielle Maslany is a Canadian actress, best known for her Primetime Emmy Award-winning performance in Orphan Black. She plays Jennifer Walters / She-Hulk, a lawyer and Bruce Banner's cousin who gains Hulk-like powers, in the Disney+ series She-Hulk: Attorney at Law.

stars.name: Simu Liu
stars.bio: Simu Liu is a Canadian-Chinese actor. He plays Xu Shang-Chi, a martial arts expert who becomes a superhero, in Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings.

stars.name: Iman Vellani
stars.bio: Iman Vellani is a Canadian-Pakistani actress. She plays Kamala Khan / Ms. Marvel, a Pakistani-American teenager and huge Captain Marvel fan who discovers she has superpowers, in the Disney+ series Ms. Marvel and The Marvels.

stars.name: Jonathan Majors
stars.character: Kang the Conqueror / He Who Remains
stars.bio: Jonathan Michael Majors is an American actor. He played variants of Kang the Conqueror across the MCU, including He Who Remains in Loki and the main villain of Ant-Man and the Wasp: Quantumania. He was written out of the MCU following legal issues.

stars.name: Hailee Steinfeld
stars.bio: Hailee Steinfeld is an American actress and singer. She plays Kate Bishop, a skilled archer who idolizes Hawkeye and eventually takes on the title, in the Disney+ series Hawkeye.

stars.name: Florence Pugh
stars.bio: Florence Rose Pugh is an English actress. She plays Yelena Belova, another Black Widow and Natasha Romanoff's surrogate sister, in the MCU. She debuted in Black Widow (2021) and also appeared in Hawkeye.

stars.name: Wunmi Mosaku
stars.bio: Wunmi Mosaku is a British-Nigerian actress. She plays Hunter B-15, a TVA (Time Variance Authority) agent, in the Disney+ series Loki.

stars.name: Gugu Mbatha-Raw
stars.bio: Gugulethu Sophia Mbatha-Raw is an English actress. She plays Ravonna Renslayer, a TVA judge, in the Disney+ series Loki.

stars.name: Awkwafina

born.place: Forest Hills, Queens, New York City, New York, USA

stars.bio: Nora Lum, known professionally as Awkwafina, is an American actress, rapper, and comedian. She plays Katy Chen, Shang-Chi's best friend, in Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings.

stars.name: Salma Hayek Pinault
stars.bio: Salma Hayek Pinault is a Mexican-American actress and film producer. She plays Ajak, the leader of the Eternals, in the MCU's Eternals (2021).

stars.name: Angelina Jolie
stars.bio: Angelina Jolie Voight is an American actress, filmmaker, and humanitarian. She plays Thena, an Eternal with the power to generate weapons from cosmic energy, in the MCU's Eternals (2021).

stars.name: Richard E. Grant
stars.bio: Richard E. Grant is a British-Swazi actor. He plays Classic Loki, an older variant of Loki, in Season 1 of the Disney+ series Loki.

stars.name: Kathryn Hahn
stars.bio: Kathryn Hahn is an American actress. She plays Agatha Harkness, a powerful witch who was hiding in Westview, in WandaVision. She reprises the role in the spin-off series Agatha All Along.

stars.name: Wyatt Russell
stars.bio: Wyatt Russell is an American actor. He plays John Walker, the government-appointed replacement Captain America who later becomes the morally ambiguous U.S. Agent, in The Falcon and the Winter Soldier.

stars.name: Xochitl Gomez
stars.bio: Xochitl Gomez is an American actress. She plays America Chavez, a teenage girl with the power to punch star-shaped portals through the multiverse, in Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness.

stars.name: Tenoch Huerta Mejía
stars.bio: Tenoch Huerta Mejía is a Mexican actor. He plays Namor, the sub-mariner king of Talokan, in Black Panther: Wakanda Forever.

stars.name: Pedro Pascal
stars.bio: José Pedro Balmaceda Pascal is a Chilean-American actor. He has been cast as Reed Richards / Mister Fantastic, the leader of the Fantastic Four, in the MCU's The Fantastic Four: First Steps (2025) and Avengers: Doomsday (2026).

stars.name: Vanessa Kirby
stars.bio: Vanessa Kirby is a British actress. She has been cast as Sue Storm / The Invisible Woman in the MCU's The Fantastic Four: First Steps (2025) and Avengers: Doomsday (2026).

stars.name: Joseph Quinn
stars.bio: Joseph Quinn is a British actor, best known for his acclaimed role as Eddie Munson in Stranger Things. He has been cast as Johnny Storm / The Human Torch in the MCU's The Fantastic Four: First Steps.

stars.name: Ebon Moss-Bachrach
stars.bio: Ebon Moss-Bachrach is an American actor. He plays Ben Grimm / The Thing in the MCU's The Fantastic Four: First Steps. He is known for his Emmy-nominated role in The Bear.

stars.name: Lupita Nyong'o
stars.bio: Lupita Amondi Nyong'o is a Kenyan-Mexican actress. She plays Nakia, a Wakandan spy and T'Challa's love interest, in the Black Panther franchise.

stars.name: Michael Keaton
stars.bio: Michael John Douglas, known professionally as Michael Keaton, is an American actor. He plays Adrian Toomes / Vulture in Spider-Man: Homecoming, and reprised the role in Morbius and the upcoming Vulture Disney+ series.

stars.name: Jake Gyllenhaal
stars.bio: Jacob Benjamin Gyllenhaal is an American actor. He played Quentin Beck / Mysterio, a seemingly heroic figure revealed to be an elaborate deceiver, in Spider-Man: Far From Home.

stars.name: Natalie Portman
stars.bio: Natalie Hershlag, known professionally as Natalie Portman, is an Israeli-American actress. She plays Jane Foster, Thor's love interest, across the Thor franchise, and becomes the Mighty Thor in Thor: Love and Thunder.

stars.name: Christian Bale
stars.bio: Christian Charles Philip Bale is a British actor. He played Gorr the God Butcher, a man who swore vengeance on all gods, in Thor: Love and Thunder.

stars.name: Will Poulter
stars.bio: Will Poulter is a British actor. He plays Adam Warlock, a powerful synthetic being created by the Sovereign, in Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3.

stars.name: Ali Selim
stars.bio: Ali Selim is an American director known for directing the Secret Invasion Disney+ series.

stars.name: Emilia Clarke
stars.bio: Emilia Isabelle Euphemia Rose Clarke is a British actress, best known for playing Daenerys Targaryen in Game of Thrones. In the MCU, she plays G'iah, a Skrull and daughter of Talos, in the Disney+ series Secret Invasion.

stars.name: Ben Kingsley
stars.bio: Sir Ben Kingsley is a British actor. He plays Trevor Slattery, an actor hired to portray the Mandarin in Iron Man 3, and later appeared in Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings.

stars.name: Wai Ching Ho
stars.bio: Wai Ching Ho is a Taiwanese-American actress. She is known for playing Madame Gao, a powerful crime lord connected to the Hand, in multiple Marvel Netflix series.

stars.name: Charlie Cox
stars.bio: Charles Thomas Cox is a British actor. He is best known for playing Matt Murdock / Daredevil, a blind lawyer who is also a vigilante superhero. He played the role in the Netflix series and has reprised it in the MCU, appearing in Spider-Man: No Way Home, She-Hulk, and the Disney+ series Daredevil: Born Again.

stars.name: Vincent D'Onofrio

born.place: Brooklyn, New York City, New York, USA

stars.bio: Vincent Philip D'Onofrio is an American actor and filmmaker. He is known for playing Wilson Fisk / Kingpin, a powerful crime lord, in the Netflix Daredevil series and reprising the role in the MCU's Hawkeye, Echo, and Daredevil: Born Again.

stars.name: Alaqua Cox
stars.bio: Alaqua Cox is an American actress and member of the Menominee Nation. She is deaf and wears a prosthetic leg. She plays Maya Lopez / Echo, a deaf and skilled fighter, in Hawkeye and the Disney+ series Echo.

stars.name: Hudson Thames
stars.bio: Hudson Thames is an American actor and voice actor. He voices Peter Parker / Spider-Man in the animated Disney+ series Your Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man (2025), an MCU-set animated series that follows a young Peter Parker during his early days as Spider-Man.

stars.name: Dominique Thorne

born.place: Brooklyn, New York City, New York, USA

stars.bio: Dominique Thorne is an American actress. She plays Riri Williams / Ironheart, a genius MIT student who engineers her own Iron Man-like suit, in the MCU. She debuted in Black Panther: Wakanda Forever (2022) and stars in the Disney+ series Ironheart (2025).
